headline: JPMorgan Chase Initiative Links Community Lending Push With Valuation Debate
summary: JPMorgan Chase, NYSE:JPM, has launched the American Dream Initiative, a multi year program aimed at expanding economic opportunity. The plan includes more than 160 new branches plus targeted lending for small businesses and low to moderate income communities. The initiative focuses on lending, branch expansion, and community development to support underserved areas across the US. JPMorgan Chase enters this new phase of community investment with its shares trading at $309.87. The stock has...

headline: China’s Victory Giant Seeks Up to $2.2 Billion in Hong Kong Listing
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. began taking investor orders for a listing in Hong Kong that may raise as much as HK$17.5 billion ($2.2 billion) in what is set to be among the city’s largest first-time share sales this year. The maker of printed circuit board products — the intricate electronic backbone of artificial-intelligence servers — is offering 83.3 million shares at as much as HK$209.88 each, according to a listing document released on Monday. The firm has options to

headline: Had You Invested $1,000 in Goldman Sachs 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Now
summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) reported Q1 2026 EPS of $17.55 versus a FactSet estimate of $16.47, with revenue of $17.23 billion, up 14%, against a $16.99 billion estimate. Net earnings rose 18% to $5.63 billion, EPS climbed 24%, equity trading revenue rose 27%, and investment banking fees rose 48%. Yet the stock fell approximately 4% ... Had You Invested $1,000 in Goldman Sachs 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Now

headline: BlackRock Pivots Back to US Stocks With Strategists Seeing Iran War ‘Contained’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- BlackRock strategists have returned to an overweight view on US stocks as they see the damage to global economic growth from the Middle East conflict “likely contained.”The firm had been watching “two signposts to dial up risk-taking” after shifting to neutral as the Middle East conflict led to reducing risk a few weeks ago, strategists led by Jean Boivin, the head of the BlackRock Investment Institute, wrote in a Monday note. headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For National Bank Of Greece (ATSE:ETE)
summary: National Bank of Greece is now working off a slightly higher internal fair value estimate, with the model price target moving from about €15.64 to roughly €15.92. That shift sits alongside Street targets that cluster in the €15.70 to €16.10 range, including JPMorgan’s €15.70 and €16.10 points, which gives you a sense of how closely aligned current pricing views have become. Reading on, you will see how these price target tweaks feed into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch as it...
